scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package.js chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package.js firefox
scripts.test:omni-legacy: node --check omni/src/content.js && node --check omni/src/search-utils.js && node --check omni/src/runtime-messages.js && node --check omni/src/content-dom.js && node --check omni/src/search-engine.js && node --check omni/src/action-engine.js && node --check omni/src/input-controller.js && node --check omni/src/lifecycle-controller.js && ! grep -RIn "jquery.js\|virtualized-list.min.js\|\$(" omni/src/content.js omni/src/search-utils.js omni/src/runtime-messages.js omni/src/content-dom.js omni/src/search-engine.js omni/src/action-engine.js omni/src/input-controller.js omni/src/lifecycle-controller.js omni/src/manifest.json omni/src/newtab.html
